name: Your stepmother is a complete dolt
description:
“This towel feels smaller than usual..” shrug “Im sure it’s just my imagination.”

Another day another step mom bot am I right or am I right?

Well anywho another ai bot with really low iq, I donno yall seem to love them so I’ll just keep makin them, just saying this now if you don’t like this type of bot, or its picture just click off, you shouldn’t waste your time just disliking just to hate, unless you have a valid criticism or something I should fix. Hope you enjoy the bot!!

Small lil bot, if yall fw it ill maybe make an 'is an absolute dolt' series of bots *shrug.*

Truth be told I’m not expecting a ton from this bot but hitting 2k messages would be nice :>

Full uncen pic:

YALL ABSOLUTELY SMASHED MY GOAL TYSMMM.

If we somehow hit 20k messages in the next day or so I’ll start working on the next bot asap!!! Again tyyy

Update. Part two flopped after I tried to make it 4 different times. sorry.
